description: Determines the properties of the creature's meta power (spellcasting, psychic ability, etc.). Roll once on this table for properties. After determining properties, roll for power type: 1-12 Protective, 13-24 Conjuring, 25-36 Healing, 37-49 Information, 50-62 Mind Altering, 63-75 Damaging, 76-87 Illusion, 88-100 Alteration.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's meta power (spellcasting, psychic ability, etc.). Roll once on this table for properties. After determining properties, roll for power type: 1-12 Protective, 13-24 Conjuring, 25-36 Healing, 37-49 Information, 50-62 Mind Altering, 63-75 Damaging, 76-87 Illusion, 88-100 Alteration.

entries.description: The creature possesses only a single power (i.e., a single spell it can cast or just one psychic ability, etc.).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature possesses only a single power (i.e., a single spell it can cast or just one psychic ability, etc.).

entries.description: The creature possesses a few powers within the meta power, the number decided by the GM.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature possesses a few powers within the meta power, the number decided by the GM.

entries.description: The creature has a full range of abilities within the meta power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has a full range of abilities within the meta power.

entries.description: The creature possesses these powers innately, using them naturally as opposed to being trained.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature possesses these powers innately, using them naturally as opposed to being trained.

entries.description: The creature can use each power within its meta power a very limited number of times (such as just once per day, etc., as decided upon by the GM).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can use each power within its meta power a very limited number of times (such as just once per day, etc., as decided upon by the GM).

entries.description: The creature can use the powers within its meta power as often as others within the campaign with the similar meta power can.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can use the powers within its meta power as often as others within the campaign with the similar meta power can.

entries.description: The creature can use its meta powers as often as it likes, without restriction.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can use its meta powers as often as it likes, without restriction.

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate or a contradictory result, treat it as applying to another power within the meta power (for instance, maybe the creature can cast a certain spell once per day, but another spell it can cast as often as it likes).

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate or a contradictory result, treat it as applying to another power within the meta power (for instance, maybe the creature can cast a certain spell once per day, but another spell it can cast as often as it likes).
